rationale: Section 26.09 is a procedural tax-calculation framework that generically subtracts 'any partial exemption allowed the property owner.' It automatically incorporates whatever exemption amount §11.13(b) sets, so raising the amount requires no amendment here.
quote: subtracting from the appraised value of a property as shown on the appraisal roll for the unit the amount of any partial exemption allowed the property owner that applies to appraised value to determine net appraised value
_note: No conflict. §26.09(c)(1) references 'any partial exemption' generically; increasing the §11.13(b) amount flows through without statutory amendment to §26.09.
